description_long: This is an upright piano with a dark, polished wooden exterior and a classic rectangular form. The front features a full keyboard with alternating white and black keys, three metallic pedals at the base, and a visible brand marking above the keys. The sides are solid and flat, while the back is a continuous wooden panel with no visible openings or features. The top lid is fully closed, giving the piano a sleek and unified appearance. The overall design is traditional, suitable for placement in public spaces, music schools, or urban environments.
description: A dark wood upright piano with a full keyboard, three pedals, and a closed top lid, featuring a classic and polished appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard, three metallic pedals, and the brand marking above the keys.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the piano, the profile of the keyboard, and the protruding pedals.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid, unadorned wooden back panel with no visible features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the piano's depth and the side profile of the keyboard and pedals.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard 88-key layout with alternating white and black keys in a traditional arrangement.
